title: Foreign employment income and section 23AG – employees
description: Find out about tax and super on foreign employment income covered by 23AG or 23AF if you worked overseas.
keywords: Overseas, Foreign employment income, overseas employment, employees working overseas, overseas income, foreign income, tax exempt income

child_links.title: Exemption for Australian residents under 23AG
child_links.description: Use the steps to work out if your foreign employment income is exempt from Australian tax.

child_links.title: Exempt income and other tax obligations
child_links.description: How your foreign employment income can affect other aspects of your tax, even if it is exempt from income tax.

child_links.title: Pay as you go and foreign employment income
child_links.description: Make sure your pay as you go withholding meets your end-of-year tax liability if you have exempt foreign income.

child_links.title: Fringe benefits tax and foreign employment income
child_links.description: Find out how a fringe benefit you receive may affect your eligibility to claim a foreign income tax offset.

child_links.title: Superannuation and foreign employment income
child_links.description: Check your super entitlements and deductions on your foreign employment income.
